Operation 'cancelRun' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Summary is concise and action-oriented, but description is completely missing. Added context about run state requirements, return value, and side effects (job termination) to help AI agents understand when this operation is appropriate and what to expect.

data.description_suggestion: Cancels an in-progress dbt Cloud run for the specified account and run ID. The run must be in an active state (queued or running) to be cancelled. Returns the updated run object with status set to cancelled. This operation terminates any currently executing jobs within the run.
data.reasoning: Summary is concise and action-oriented, but description is completely missing. Added context about run state requirements, return value, and side effects (job termination) to help AI agents understand when this operation is appropriate and what to expect.

message: Operation 'triggerJob' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Summary is action-oriented and clear, but description is missing. Added details about optional request parameters, returned run object, and critical side effect information (job execution queuing) to help AI agents understand the impact of this operation.

data.description_suggestion: Initiates an immediate execution of a dbt job identified by job_id within the specified account_id. Accepts optional request parameters to customize the run (e.g., override variables, select specific models). Returns a run object containing the newly created run's ID, status, and execution details. Side effect: Creates a new run record and queues the job for execution. Requires valid authentication token with account access.
data.reasoning: Summary is action-oriented and clear, but description is missing. Added details about optional request parameters, returned run object, and critical side effect information (job execution queuing) to help AI agents understand the impact of this operation.
